coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass gives 50% off tickets for up to four people. You will receive the code after booking the pass. Please check https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule/ for the ferry you are looking for to ensure it is running on the day you are booking. Each ferry has a different schedule.
